topic: A ring of coarse salt appears around the bed each morning.
title: A Ring Of Salt Appears Around My Bed Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A ring of coarse salt appears around my bed each morning, and I own no such salt.
scenes.image_prompt: a ring of coarse white salt circling a bed on a dark wood floor, dim morning light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone in a small house outside town.
scenes.image_prompt: a modest bedroom with a single bed, gray light through thin curtains, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the place clean. Spotless, even.
scenes.image_prompt: a tidy bedroom floor, neatly made bed, soft window light, deep shadow corners, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first morning I thought a bag had spilled.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand brushing coarse salt off a wooden floor near a bed, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But it formed a perfect circle.
scenes.image_prompt: a flawless circle of salt around a bed seen from above, dim light, long shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I swept it away. By the next dawn the ring was back, unbroken.
scenes.image_prompt: a fresh unbroken ring of salt on a clean floor at dawn, gray light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I taped paper over every gap in the room.
scenes.image_prompt: strips of paper taped over a door frame and window edges in a dim bedroom, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The tape held all night. The ring still appeared by morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a sealed bedroom door with intact tape and a salt ring on the floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I read that salt rings are meant to keep something in.
scenes.image_prompt: an open old book on a bed under lamplight, dark room, shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night I woke inside the circle, and the salt was on the wrong side.
scenes.image_prompt: a bed encircled by salt with a gap broken on one edge, dim moonlight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now I lay the salt myself, every night, before I sleep.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand pouring coarse salt in a line on a dark floor by a bed, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I still do not know which one of us it is keeping inside.
scenes.image_prompt: a bed inside a closed salt ring at night, faint window glow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
